languages.text: "Истинной кровью фон Валанциус да будет смыта скверна с Патента, десницею Его подписанного. Возвращенный на ложе свое, да вернет святыня к праву дарованному династию".

traits.locale_text: "Истинной кровью фон Валанциус да будет смыта скверна с Патента, десницею Его подписанного. Возвращенный на ложе свое, да вернет святыня к праву дарованному династию".

languages.text: "By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."
languages.original_text: "Истинной кровью фон Валанциус да будет смыта скверна с Патента, десницею Его подписанного. Возвращенный на ложе свое, да вернет святыня к праву дарованному династию".

traits.locale_text: "By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."

"By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."

"By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."

languages.text: “冯·瓦兰修斯真正的血脉在上，愿由祂右手亲签的贸易授状洗尽所有腐化。愿这圣物重归安放之处，恢复那赐予王朝的权位。”
languages.original_text: "By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “冯·瓦兰修斯真正的血脉在上，愿由祂右手亲签的贸易授状洗尽所有腐化。愿这圣物重归安放之处，恢复那赐予王朝的权位。”

languages.text: «Por la verdadera sangre de von Valancius, que la corrupción sea erradicada de la Patente que Él firmó con Su mano derecha. Una vez devuelta a su legítimo lugar, que la reliquia restablezca los derechos otorgados a la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «Por la verdadera sangre de von Valancius, que la corrupción sea erradicada de la Patente que Él firmó con Su mano derecha. Una vez devuelta a su legítimo lugar, que la reliquia restablezca los derechos otorgados a la dinastía».

languages.text: « Par le sang véritable des von Valancius, puisse la lettre de marque signée par Sa main droite être purgée de la corruption. De retour à l'abri, puisse la relique restaurer les droits échus à la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « Par le sang véritable des von Valancius, puisse la lettre de marque signée par Sa main droite être purgée de la corruption. De retour à l'abri, puisse la relique restaurer les droits échus à la dynastie. »

languages.text: "Von Valanciusların gerçek kanı adına, O'nun sağ eliyle imzalanan Ruhsatname'den yozlaşma temizlensin. Korunduğu yere geri dönen yadigâr, hanedana bahşedilen hakkı onarsın."
languages.original_text: "By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Von Valanciusların gerçek kanı adına, O'nun sağ eliyle imzalanan Ruhsatname'den yozlaşma temizlensin. Korunduğu yere geri dönen yadigâr, hanedana bahşedilen hakkı onarsın."

languages.text: "Beim wahren Blut derer von Valancius, möge der von Seiner rechten Hand unterzeichnete Handelsbrief von aller Verderbnis gereinigt werden. Möge das Relikt aufs Neue sicher verwahrt werden und das der Dynastie gewährte Recht wiederherstellen."
languages.original_text: "By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Beim wahren Blut derer von Valancius, möge der von Seiner rechten Hand unterzeichnete Handelsbrief von aller Verderbnis gereinigt werden. Möge das Relikt aufs Neue sicher verwahrt werden und das der Dynastie gewährte Recht wiederherstellen."

languages.text: 「ヴァランキウス家の血によって、王の右手に署名された証書から腐敗が洗い流され、その遺物に王家の権力が戻されることを祈る」
languages.original_text: "By the true blood of von Valancius, may the corruption be washed from the Warrant that was signed by His right hand. Returned to its place of safekeeping, may the relic restore the right bestowed upon the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: 「ヴァランキウス家の血によって、王の右手に署名された証書から腐敗が洗い流され、その遺物に王家の権力が戻されることを祈る」
